name: ドラゴンクエストタクト

detail.description:
Dragon Quest has become a tactics game! Command Dragon Quest monsters on an adventure!
The Dragon Quest series' first tactics game is simple yet deep. Plan your strategy and enjoy heated tactical battles!

□Recommended for these tactics games□
- Play all of the Dragon Quest (DQ) games planned and produced by Square Enix
- Love the worldview of the Dragon Quest (DQ) series
- Love the characters and monsters of the Dragon Quest (DQ) series
- Want a tactics game where you can control your favorite
